$comment: Core newsroom template pack - the exemplar the scaled content packs follow. Parsed by Companion.Core.Newsroom.NewsroomCorpus (grammar: {token}, {a:token}, {ord:token}, {token's}, {pool:name}, [[?token: optional segment]]). Template ids are rendezvous-selection keys: STABLE, never renamed, never reused. Situation guards ('when') narrow a template to the exact story - the most specific eligible tier always wins. Read-side only: editing this file changes display, never replay.

1980s: TRACKSIDE[[?venue: AT {venue}]] - the wire is hot.
smgp: THE BIG BOARD LIGHTS UP[[?venue: AT {venue}]].

1960s: The garlands go on and the transporters roll for the next port of call.
A good day's motoring, by any measure.
smgp: THE CROWD ROARS. THE LADDER TAKES NOTE.
ANOTHER LINE ON THE BIG BOARD.
default: The team will enjoy this one on the flight home.
Days like this are why the lights go green.
The championship rolls on, but tonight belongs to them.

1960s: A long drive home, and much to think about.
smgp: THE LADDER DOES NOT WAIT FOR ANYONE.
default: The debrief will be a long one.
Nobody said this championship would be kind.
The next round cannot come soon enough.
The points table tells its own story.
Every camp on the pit wall is recalculating.
The arithmetic of the title race just moved.
The paddock talked of little else by nightfall.
More than one team manager was seen making notes.
The mechanics will be at it long after the grandstands empty.
Somewhere in the garage, a component is going under the microscope.
Reliability is a championship position, whatever the drivers say.

templates.headline: {subject} wins[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.deck: Victory in round {round} of the {year} season[[?team: for {team}]]
templates.summary: {subject} took the win[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?expected: from an expected {ord:expected}]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} {subject} won round {round}[[?venue: at {venue}]], the flag falling {player's} way after a drive that left little room for argument.
sections.context: [[?expected: The timing sheets had {subject} pegged around {ord:expected} before the start, which makes the result read better still.]] [[?champPosition: The win moves the championship account to {ord:champPosition} overall.]]

templates.headline: BREAKTHROUGH: {subject} takes a first career victory[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.deck: The maiden win arrives in round {round}, {year}
templates.summary: A first career victory for {subject}[[?venue: at {venue}]] - the day every driver dreams about.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Every career has one line written in bold, and {subject} wrote it today: a first Grand Prix victory[[?venue: at {venue}]].
sections.context: First wins are not just results; they are permission slips. Rivals recalibrate, engineers push harder, and the driver who used to chase the leaders now knows exactly what the view from the front looks like.
sections.impact: [[?team: For {team}, the result is proof the faith was well placed.]] [[?expected: That the field expected {ord:expected} from this weekend only sharpens the point.]]

templates.headline: The wait is over: {subject} wins after {drought} races
templates.deck: A drought measured in seasons ends[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.summary: {subject} won for the first time in {drought} races.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Droughts end loudly. {drought} races after the last one, {subject} stood on the top step again[[?venue: at {venue}]], and the noise from the garage said everything about how long the wait had felt.
sections.context: Runs like this weigh on a driver: every near-miss gets replayed, every rival win gets counted. Today the counter resets to zero.

templates.headline: CHAMPION. {subject} wins[[?venue: at {venue}]] and seals the title
templates.summary: {subject} clinched the {year} championship with victory in round {round}.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} It ends the only way a championship should: with the new champion first across the line. {subject} won round {round}[[?venue: at {venue}]] and with it the {year} title.
sections.championship: No arithmetic left, no permutations, no asterisks[[?gap: - the margin stands at {gap} points with the remaining rounds now academic]]. {pool:champChatter}
sections.close: The record books have a new line, and it is written in ink.

templates.headline: {subject} masters the rain[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.summary: {subject} won a soaked round {round}[[?venue: at {venue}]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The rain sorts drivers into two groups, and {subject} spent the afternoon proving which one {player} belongs to, winning a treacherous round {round}[[?venue: at {venue}]].
sections.context: Visibility, standing water, and a field tiptoeing on slicks' edge - conditions that flatter nobody and expose everybody. Wins like this get remembered longer than the points suggest.

templates.headline: {subject} wins and takes the championship lead
templates.deck: Round {round} victory rewrites the title table
templates.summary: {subject} won round {round} and moved to the head of the standings.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Two prizes in one afternoon: {subject} took the flag[[?venue: at {venue}]] and the championship lead with it.
sections.championship: {pool:champChatter} [[?gap: The gap at the top now reads {gap} points.]]

templates.headline: {subject} on the podium[[?venue: at {venue}]] with {ord:position}
templates.summary: {subject} finished {ord:position}[[?venue: at {venue}]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} {subject} climbed the podium steps[[?venue: at {venue}]], converting round {round} into {a:ord:position}-place finish and a hatful of points.
sections.context: [[?expected: Set against an expected {ord:expected}, it is honest, valuable work.]] [[?champPosition: The standings now show {ord:champPosition}.]]

templates.headline: A first podium for {subject}
templates.deck: The first taste of champagne arrives in round {round}, {year}
templates.summary: {subject} stood on a Grand Prix podium for the first time.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The first podium is the moment a career stops being a promise and starts being a record. {subject} collected it today[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?position: with {ord:position}]].
sections.impact: [[?team: {team} has been waiting for exactly this kind of afternoon.]] {pool:paddockBuzz}

templates.headline: The day it all changed: {player's} maiden victory
templates.deck: A feature on the first win, round {round}, {year}
templates.summary: How {subject} turned promise into a maiden Grand Prix win.

sections.lead: Some results are markers. A maiden win[[?venue: at {venue}]] is a border: everything before it was the apprenticeship, everything after is the career.
sections.context: Ask the old hands and they will tell you the first one is the hardest - the mind starts negotiating with the gap behind long before the flag. {subject} kept the negotiation short.
sections.next: The question the paddock asks now is the only one that matters: was it a peak, or a preview?

templates.headline: Off the mark: first points for {subject}
templates.summary: {subject} scored a first championship point[[?position: with {ord:position}]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The hardest column in racing to fill is the first one. {subject} is off the mark[[?position: with {ord:position}]][[?venue: at {venue}]], and the season has a different shape now.

templates.headline: Debut day: {subject} joins the World Championship grid
templates.deck: A first Grand Prix start[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?team: with {team}]]
templates.summary: {subject} made a first championship start in round {round}.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Every name in the record books started as a rookie on a grid somewhere. Today it was {player's} turn[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?team: , wearing {team's} colours]].

templates.headline: {subject} banks points with {ord:position}[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.summary: {ord:position} and points for {subject} in round {round}.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} No headlines chased, none needed: {subject} brought the car home {ord:position}[[?venue: at {venue}]] and added to the season's account.
sections.context: [[?champPosition: The championship ledger reads {ord:champPosition} after round {round}.]] {pool:champChatter}

templates.headline: A quiet afternoon: {subject} takes {ord:position}
templates.summary: {subject} finished {ord:position} in round {round}.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Not every Sunday moves the needle. {subject} came home {ord:position}[[?venue: at {venue}]], a result that keeps the machinery honest and the points account unchanged.

templates.headline: Above the waterline: how {subject} turned {ord:expected} into {ord:position}
templates.deck: Analysis: a result the timing sheets did not predict
templates.summary: {subject} beat expectation by finishing {ord:position} against a predicted {ord:expected}.

sections.lead: The stopwatch said {ord:expected}. The flag said {ord:position}. The difference[[?venue: at {venue}]] was the driver.
sections.stats: Overdeliveries like this are the quiet currency of a career - team managers keep private lists of who extracts more than the car offers, and {subject} moved up that list today.

templates.headline: A day to forget: {subject} falls to {ord:position}
templates.deck: Analysis: where an expected {ord:expected} went missing
templates.summary: {subject} finished {ord:position} against an expected {ord:expected}.

sections.lead: On paper this was {a:ord:expected}-place car. On the road[[?venue: at {venue}]] it came home {ord:position}, and the gap between those two numbers is the story of {player's} afternoon.

templates.headline: Machinery fails {subject}[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.summary: {subject} retired from round {round} with a mechanical failure.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The cruellest retirements are the ones the driver can do nothing about. {player's} race ended in the garage[[?venue: at {venue}]], the car unwilling to finish what its driver started.
sections.reliability: {pool:wrenchNote} [[?streak: This is now {streak} retirements in succession - a pattern, not an accident.]]

templates.headline: {subject} out of round {round} after an error
templates.summary: {subject} retired from round {round} after a driving mistake.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Racing drivers live at the edge of adhesion, and today {subject} found the far side of it[[?venue: at {venue}]]. The car is gathered up; the points are gone.
sections.context: The honest ones will tell you the mistakes teach more than the trophies. The debrief will test that theory.

templates.headline: A first blank: {subject} learns the other side of racing
templates.summary: A first career retirement for {subject}.

sections.lead: Every career ledger has two columns, and {subject} filled in the second one for the first time today. Nobody escapes it; the good ones just visit rarely.

templates.headline: {subject} takes pole[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.deck: Fastest of all in qualifying for round {round}
templates.summary: {subject} qualified on pole for round {round}.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} One lap, no traffic, no excuses: {subject} put the car at the front of the grid[[?venue: for {venue}]], and Sunday now starts from the best seat in the house.

templates.headline: First pole for {subject}
templates.deck: The single-lap breakthrough arrives in round {round}
templates.summary: {subject} took a first career pole position.

sections.lead: Race wins can be inherited; poles never are. {player's} first pole[[?venue: at {venue}]] is one lap of pure, unarguable speed, and the timing beam does not do sentiment.

templates.headline: Qualifying shock: {subject} lines up {ord:quali}
templates.deck: The grid[[?venue: at {venue}]] did not read the script
templates.summary: {subject} qualified {ord:quali}[[?expected: against an expected {ord:expected}]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The grid sheet raised eyebrows down the pit lane: {subject} starts {ord:quali}[[?expected: where the form book said {ord:expected}]].
sections.next: Race day will confirm whether Saturday was a fluke or a warning.

templates.headline: {streak} in a row: {subject} keeps the run alive
templates.summary: {subject} has now won {streak} consecutive races.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Winning once takes speed. Winning {streak} in succession takes something rarer - a car, a driver, and a team refusing to blink in the same season. The run continued[[?venue: at {venue}]] today.

templates.headline: Metronome: {streak} straight podiums for {subject}
templates.summary: {subject} extended a podium streak to {streak} races.

sections.lead: Consistency is the least glamorous superpower in racing and the most valuable. {subject} has now stood on the rostrum {streak} times in succession.

templates.headline: {subject} makes it {streak} scoring finishes in a row
templates.summary: {subject} extended a points streak to {streak} races.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Quietly, relentlessly, {subject} keeps cashing cheques: {streak} consecutive rounds in the points after today[[?venue: at {venue}]].

templates.headline: Crisis deepens: {streak} straight retirements for {subject}
templates.deck: The garage has questions and no answers yet
templates.summary: {subject} has now failed to finish {streak} races in succession.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} One retirement is racing. {streak} in a row is a siege. {player's} season is being dismantled one non-finish at a time, and the garage knows it.

templates.headline: Relief at last: {subject} scores after {drought} barren races
templates.summary: {subject} returned to the points after {drought} races without.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} {drought} races is a long time to stare at a zero. {subject} finally put numbers on the board again[[?venue: at {venue}]], and the exhale from the garage was audible.

templates.headline: {subject} takes the championship lead
templates.deck: The title table has a new name on top after round {round}
templates.summary: {subject} moved to the top of the drivers' standings.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} There is only one seat at the head of the table, and after round {round}[[?venue: at {venue}]] it belongs to {subject}.
sections.championship: {pool:champChatter} [[?gap: The advantage stands at {gap} points.]] Leading is a different sport: everyone behind has a target now, and it is painted on {player's} gearbox.

templates.headline: {subject} surrenders the championship lead[[?rival: to {rival}]]
templates.summary: {subject} dropped from the top of the standings[[?rival: behind {rival}]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The view from the top never lasts by right. After round {round}, the table reads differently[[?rival: - {rival} now leads]] and {subject} is the one doing the chasing.

templates.headline: New name on top: {subject} leads the championship[[?rival: as {rival} slips]]
templates.summary: {subject} took over the championship lead after round {round}.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The title race turned over at the top: {subject} now heads the standings[[?rival: , displacing {rival},]] after round {round}[[?venue: at {venue}]].

templates.headline: Title race tightens: {gap} points cover the top of the table
templates.summary: The championship gap at the top is down to {gap} points.

sections.lead: The comfortable phase of {player's} season is over - if it ever existed. With the calendar shortening, the gap at the top has closed to {gap} points, and every session from here is played for keeps.

templates.headline: It goes to the last round: {gap} points in it
templates.deck: One race left. Everything still to play for.
templates.summary: The championship will be decided at the final round, with {gap} points separating the contenders.

sections.lead: Seasons are long arguments, and this one will be settled in a single afternoon. {gap} points separate the contenders with one round remaining[[?subject: , and {subject} holds the high ground]].
sections.championship: {pool:champChatter} Winner takes the year. Everyone else takes the winter to think about it.

templates.headline: CHAMPION: {subject} seals the {year} title with rounds to spare
templates.summary: {subject} clinched the {year} championship early.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The remaining rounds are now exhibition races as far as the title is concerned: {subject} is the {year} champion, the gap[[?gap: of {gap} points]] beyond mathematical reach.
sections.championship: Titles decided early are statements. Nobody backs into a championship with races in hand - it is taken, round after round, until the table gives up arguing.

templates.headline: The dream dies: {player's} title challenge is mathematically over
templates.summary: {subject} can no longer win the {year} championship.

sections.lead: There is no flag for this moment, no ceremony. Somewhere in the arithmetic after round {round}, {player's} championship ended[[?rival: - {rival} cannot be caught]].
sections.context: A title bid that reached the sharp end of the table does not vanish; it becomes the baseline for next year. But tonight it stings exactly as much as it should.

templates.headline: {subject} is the {year} World Champion
templates.summary: {subject} won the {year} drivers' championship.

sections.lead: The season asked its question over every round of the calendar, and the answer is {subject}: {year} World Champion.

templates.headline: Season {season} closes: the {year} year in the books
templates.summary: The {year} season is complete.

sections.lead: The transporters are unloaded for the last time this year. The {year} season is finished - the results permanent, the arguments just beginning.
sections.close: Winter is for rebuilding: cars, budgets, and reputations alike.

templates.headline: Lights out on {year}: a new season begins
templates.summary: The {year} season is underway[[?team: with {player} at {team}]].

sections.lead: Winter's promises are due. The {year} championship season opens with every points column blank and every garage convinced this is their year[[?team: - none more so than {team}]].
sections.next: The first round always answers the winter's biggest question: who actually did their homework?

templates.headline: A new name in the paddock: {player} arrives
templates.summary: {player} begins a World Championship career[[?team: with {team}]].

sections.lead: Every legend was once just a name on an entry list. {player} joins the championship[[?team: with {team}]], carrying nothing but a helmet bag and intentions.

templates.headline: {player} switches to {team}[[?rival: , leaving {rival}]]
templates.deck: Driver market: the move is official
templates.summary: {player} joins {team} for the {year} season.

sections.lead: The rumours are now a contract: {player} starts the {year} season in {team's} colours[[?rival: , closing the book on the {rival} chapter]].
sections.context: New team, new engineers, new political map. The stopwatch will not care about any of it - which is exactly why moves like this get made.

templates.headline: {milestone} career {counter} for {subject}
templates.deck: A round number for the record books
templates.summary: {subject} reached {milestone} career {counter}.

sections.lead: Round numbers are how a sport keeps score of a career. {subject} brought up {milestone} {counter} today[[?venue: at {venue}]], and the statisticians updated their ledgers.

templates.headline: Career best: {subject} takes {ord:position}
templates.summary: A career-best finish of {ord:position} for {subject}.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Progress in racing is measured one place at a time. {ord:position}[[?venue: at {venue}]] is the best Sunday of {player's} career so far - emphasis on so far.

templates.headline: {subject} climbs to {ord:champPosition} in the standings
templates.summary: {subject} moved up to {ord:champPosition} in the championship.

sections.lead: The table moved under the field today: {subject} jumped to {ord:champPosition} in the championship after round {round}.

templates.headline: {subject} makes it {streak} wins on the trot
templates.summary: {subject} has won {streak} consecutive races.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The rest of the field has a problem with a name on it: {subject}[[?winnerTeam: and {winnerTeam}]] took a {ord:streak} consecutive win[[?venue: at {venue}]], and nobody looks close to an answer.

templates.headline: Shock of the season: {subject} wins for {winnerTeam}
templates.deck: An upset nobody's form book allowed
templates.summary: {subject} took an upset victory for {winnerTeam}.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Days like this are why they run the races: {subject} put {a:winnerTeam} on the top step[[?venue: at {venue}]], upending every assumption in the paddock about where wins are allowed to come from.
sections.impact: For the small teams, results like this are oxygen - proof the mountain can be climbed with the right afternoon and the nerve to take it.

templates.headline: Untouchable: {subject} converts pole into victory
templates.summary: {subject} led from pole to flag in round {round}.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Some wins are struggles and some are statements. {subject} owned every meaningful lap[[?venue: at {venue}]] - fastest on Saturday, first on Sunday, and never seriously asked a question in between.

templates.headline: {subject} on the rise: the paddock takes notice
templates.summary: {subject} climbed the competitive order this season.

sections.lead: Garages talk, and this winter they are talking about {subject}: a season of genuine progress has moved the operation up the competitive order.

templates.headline: Hard winter ahead for {subject}
templates.summary: {subject} slipped down the competitive order this season.

sections.lead: The stopwatch delivered its end-of-season verdict on {subject}, and it was not kind: the operation heads into winter having lost ground it will have to buy, build, or bleed to recover.

templates.headline: Contract talk: {subject} tables an offer for {player}
templates.summary: {player} received a contract offer from {subject}.

sections.lead: The driver market never sleeps, and it has {player's} name on its desk: {subject} has put a formal offer on the table for next season.

templates.headline: Seat open[[?subject: : {subject} leaves a vacancy]]
templates.summary: A race seat has opened in the paddock.

sections.lead: Nature abhors a vacuum and the driver market abhors an empty cockpit[[?subject: - {subject's} departure leaves exactly that]]. The phone lines are already warm.

templates.headline: {subject} takes the open seat[[?reason: at {reason}]]
templates.summary: {subject} was signed to fill an open race seat.

sections.lead: The music stopped and {subject} found a chair: the open seat is filled, and one more domino in the driver market has fallen.

templates.headline: Is {subject} weighing the future?
templates.deck: Paddock talk[[?milestone: - at {milestone}, the question asks itself]]
templates.summary: Paddock talk suggests {subject} is considering retirement.

sections.lead: The quietest story in any paddock is a veteran doing arithmetic. Those close to {subject} say the sums are being done[[?milestone: - the calendar says {milestone}, and calendars are honest]].
sections.context: Nothing is decided, and nothing may be. But the conversations exist, and in this paddock, conversations have a way of becoming announcements.

templates.headline: {subject} calls time on a racing career
templates.deck: The paddock loses one of its own
templates.summary: {subject} has retired from the championship.

sections.lead: The grid will look different next season: {subject} is stepping away[[?milestone: at {milestone}]], closing a career the paddock will spend the winter measuring.
sections.close: Racing forgets no one who was worth remembering.

templates.headline: {subject} injured[[?missRaces: - out for {missRaces}]]
templates.summary: {subject} was injured in an accident[[?missRaces: and will miss {missRaces} races]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The sport's oldest tax came due today: {subject} was hurt in an accident[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?missRaces: and will watch the next {missRaces} from the sidelines]].
sections.close: The car can be rebuilt by Tuesday. Drivers keep their own schedule.

templates.headline: Season over: {subject} ruled out by injury
templates.summary: {player's} season has been ended by injury.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The medical bulletin nobody wanted: {player's} injuries will not heal on a racing calendar's schedule, and the season is over[[?venue: after the accident at {venue}]].
sections.context: Seasons end; careers resume. The paddock has seen enough comebacks to know which sentence matters more.

templates.headline: In memoriam: {subject}
templates.summary: {subject} lost their life in a racing accident[[?venue: at {venue}]].

sections.lead: Motor racing paid its terrible price today. {subject} lost their life in an accident[[?venue: at {venue}]], and everything else this sport does - the times, the points, the arguments - stopped mattering at once.
sections.context: The paddock is a small town. It buries its own with the flags lowered and the engines silent, and it remembers far longer than the record books require.
sections.close: The season will resume. It will not be the same.

templates.headline: {subject} sits out round {round}
templates.summary: {subject} missed round {round} through injury.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The hardest race is the one watched from the pit wall: {subject} sat out round {round}[[?venue: at {venue}]], the recovery clock still running.
